Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ head < tail
      /\ head < K
      /\ head' = head + 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ head = tail
      /\ head < K
      /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = tail + 1
          /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ head = tail
      /\ head = K
      /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

TypeOK == /\ head \in Nat
          /\ tail \in Nat
          /\ Len(q) = tail - head
          /\ Len(q) <= K
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head <= K
          /\ tail <= K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = Follower
Candidate == state = Candidate
Leader == state = Leader

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
        /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \notin readers'
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \notin readers'
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet, Subset
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq :
        /\ chunk \in Subset(CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = FALSE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ \E retries \in Int :
                /\ retries \in retransmit_count
                /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
                /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ \E retries \in Int :
                /\ retries \in retransmit_count
                /\ retries >= MAX_RETRIES
                /\ channel' = channel
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = c' THEN allocated[c] \cup {p}

        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = c' THEN allocated[c] \ {p}

          /\ p \in allocated[c]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : \A p \in allocated[c] : p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : \A p \in allocated[c] : \A q \in allocated[c] : p = q
          /\ \A c \in Client : \A p \in allocated[c] : \A d \in Client : d # c
          /\ \A p \in allocated[c] : \A q \in allocated[d] : p # q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> ==

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
